untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of 8 consecutive new price highs and tracking of white candle count across a multi-bar sequence. Available indicators do not include pattern recognition or lookback aggregation functions to count consecutive highs or measure candle color ratios across a fixed-length window. The 48% success rate metric and reversal probability are statistical outcomes, not entry/exit conditions that can be mechanically coded without custom pattern detection logic.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core pattern characteristics: (1) new high each day = high > prev_high, (2) most candles white = body_pct > 0.5 and close > open, (3) exit on reversal = close falls below prior close. However, the strict requirement for exactly 8 consecutive new highs and the assertion that reversal occurs only 48% of the time cannot be expressed with the allowed indicator set. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern scanner or state machine to track the sequence length and success probability.
